identity.name: CardioVision AI
identity.visual_mood: Sterile cleanliness mixed with organic human warmth. High-contrast data visualization.

headings.usage: Use for all section titles and large metrics. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for labels, inputs, and paragraphs. Excellent legibility for medical data.

primary.description: Deep Slate Blue (Slate 900) - Used for primary text, strong borders, and footer.

secondary.description: Surgical Teal (Teal 600) - Used for primary actions, success states, and brand accents. (Distinct from forbidden teal #1B93A4).

accent.description: Pulse Red (Red 500) - Used strictly for 'Heartbeat' animations, high-risk warnings, and urgent CTAs.

images.alt: Doctor consulting patient with modern tablet
images.usage: Use in 'AI Chatbot' intro or 'About' section.

images.alt: Healthy fresh vegetables and heart healthy food

images.usage: Use as a subtle background for the 'AR Visualization' placeholder.

Header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-white/20 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl

HealthForm.style: Clean white card with floating labels or clear bold headings. No clutter.

AR_Container.style: bg-slate-900 rounded-3xl relative overflow-hidden aspect-video border border-slate-700 shadow-2xl
AR_Container.overlay: Grid overlay (CSS radial-gradient dots) to simulate 3D space.
AR_Container.text: Waiting for Heart Data... / Initializing Unity WebGL...

Chatbot.style: Fixed bottom-right or embedded section. Glassmorphism container.
Chatbot.ui: ChatGPT-style input field with 'Send' button. Message bubbles with distinct colors (User: Gray, AI: Teal).

required.name: Heartbeat
required.css: @keyframes pulse-red { 0%, 100% { color: #EF4444; transform: scale(1); } 50% { color: #DC2626; transform: scale(1.1); } }
required.usage: Apply to the Heart icon in the logo.

required.name: FadeInUp
required.props: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
required.usage: Apply to all major sections on scroll.

required.name: Scanning
required.css: Linear gradient moving top to bottom over the image upload area.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure all text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background.
Use 'rem' for font sizes and spacing.
Never use pure black (#000000); use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
All interactive elements must have a :hover and :focus state.
Use data-testid attributes for all inputs and buttons (e.g., 'submit-health-data').
Mobile First: Always write classes for mobile first (e.g., 'p-4 md:p-8').
No generic 'Lorem Ipsum' - use realistic medical placeholder text.
